note: Per-drug A0 (no-graph) outcomes, seed 62, to resolve the clean-3 split in paper15 S6. Generated by cllm.realkg_a0_perdrug. A0 ignores retrieval, so no engine; temp-0. Resolves the prior aggregate-vs-subset contradiction (A0=84.6%=11/13 cannot coexist with 0/3 on a 3-subset).
conclusion: Only BPDCN/pivekimab is a genuine isolation (A0 0/4); Hunter and achondroplasia are mostly inferred (3/4). The paper's 'A0=0/3 on three clean names' was wrong; corrected in S6. gpt-5.2 A0 has drifted 84.6%->92.3% vs the stored realkg_n13_s62.json (model-version drift).
